content: Just as the linguistic definition of reflexion frames it as both a passive physical phenomenon (light reflection) and an active metacognitive process (personal learning reflection), LLM self-reflection mechanisms can be redesigned to integrate both passive memory reflection and active critical reflection. Passive memory reflection would automatically replay prior generation traces to surface consistent implicit patterns, while active critical reflection would deliberately contrast inconsistent outputs to catch errors, creating a more robust dual-mode self-improvement framework for autonomous agents.
